mapper.sql: id id, job_name jobName, executor_handler executorHandler, executor_param executorParam, job_status jobStatus, create_time createTime, update_time updateTime, cron_expression cronExpression
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_info (job_name, executor_handler, executor_param, job_status, create_time, update_time, cron_expression) VALUES (#{jobName}, #{executorHandler}, #{executorParam}, #{jobStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{cronExpression})
mapper.update: UPDATE job_info SET job_name = #{jobName}, executor_handler = #{executorHandler}, executor_param = #{executorParam}, job_status = #{jobStatus}, update_time = #{updateTime}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM job_info ORDER BY id DESC
